description:
Grocery, to-do, and packing lists, ordered by store aisle or category. No ads.
Groce is a practical list app for everyday life: grocery shopping, to-do tasks, and packing for trips — all in one place, without distractions.

Free. Open source. No ads. No analytics. No tracking. No account required.

GROCERY LIST — SHOP BY AISLE
The standout feature: define the aisles in your own store and assign each item to its aisle. Your shopping list is always displayed in aisle order — you walk through the store once, in order, never doubling back and never frantically scanning the list before moving to the next aisle. Once you've tried it, you won't shop any other way.

Keep a full catalogue of items and use the "Needed" view to see only what you're currently out of. Mark staples as weekly recurring so they're easy to add back each week.

TO-DO LISTS
Create as many named to-do lists as you need, organised by category in your own order. Tasks can be marked recurring so they're easy to re-add each time you start fresh.

PACKING LIST
Pack for a trip without forgetting anything. Items are grouped by category in your chosen order — everything grouped logically, no hunting through the list. Recurring items (passport, charger, and so on) can be set once and reused for every trip.

SHARING
Share a grocery, to-do, or packing list with other users.

PRIVACY
All data is stored in plain CSV files on your device. This F-Droid build has no network access. Nothing is sent to any server.

BACKUP
Export and import your lists as CSV files from the Settings screen. The full version also supports automatic Google Drive backup.
